title: Systems Security and Innovation (SSI) Lab
description: Focuses on cutting-edge research in cybersecurity, secure software systems, blockchain technologies, and privacy-preserving solutions. It supports the design and evaluation of resilient digital infrastructures for Industry 4.0 and smart systems.
shortDescription: Secure systems research hub for cyber defense, blockchain assurance, and privacy engineering.

title: IoT and Robotics Lab
description: Develops intelligent, connected systems integrating sensors, embedded platforms, and automation technologies. Emphasizes smart environments, industrial automation, and real-time data-driven robotic applications.
shortDescription: Applied prototyping space for sensors, edge systems, autonomous robotics, and smart automation.

title: AI and Machine Learning Lab
description: Advances research in data analytics, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision. Aims to solve real-world problems through intelligent algorithms and scalable AI-driven solutions.
shortDescription: Computational research environment for ML pipelines, computer vision, NLP, and predictive analytics.

title: Bioinformatics and Drug Designing Lab
description: Applies computational techniques to biological data analysis and drug discovery. Focuses on genomics, proteomics, molecular modelling, and in silico drug design.
shortDescription: Integrates molecular data science with virtual screening and computational pathways for drug discovery.

title: Molecular Biology Lab
description: Conducts experimental research on cellular and molecular mechanisms of life. Supports studies in genetics, microbiology, and biotechnology with applications in health, agriculture, and environmental science.
shortDescription: Wet-lab platform for molecular assays, genetic analysis, and translational biotechnology studies.

title: Material Science Lab
description: Explores the synthesis, characterization, and application of advanced materials. Research areas include nanomaterials, polymers, and functional materials for energy, electronics, and environmental sustainability.
shortDescription: Engineering-focused facility for testing materials performance in electronics, energy, and textile applications.

title: Animal House Lab
description: Supports preclinical experimental studies with controlled animal care, protocol-compliant testing environments, and translational pharmacological research workflows.
shortDescription: Regulated preclinical research setting for in vivo model studies, therapeutic validation, and safety assessment.
